name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.71: draft products with deferred creation for the receipt flow. A receipt line for a product not yet in the catalog can now be "drafted" (named at review time) instead of created inline; on confirm its net cost parks in a new product_drafts table. Confirmed receipts show a "products to create" list; finishing a draft opens the normal new-product modal (prefilled, carrying draftId) and on creation the parked cost transfers onto the real product and the draft is cleared. Drafts are kept OUT of the products table so search/reports/catalog/Weimi never see a half-real product. New: product_drafts table; GET /api/v1/product-drafts; DELETE /api/v1/product-drafts/:id; POST /api/v1/products accepts draftId and transfers the parked cost; receipt confirm accepts draft lines (matchStatus draft + draftName). Cumulative over v5.70. NEXT PROJECT: idea 2 = photo+barcode product enrichment (name/size/weight/nutrition/VAT + web image 800x800 with fallback to user photo).
